title: Render Mutation-Seam PM Intake Redeploy And Blocker Classification
objective: Redeploy current origin/clean-main to the existing Render mutation-seam service or classify why hosted PM intake reads remain missing, without creating services, changing schema, persisting approvals, importing rows, or mutating business state.
current_evidence: PM Lane 041 read-only hosted proof shows https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com/health returns 200.
All four current PM intake reads return framework 404 on the hosted mutation seam.
Hosted schedule projects, drivers, tracer, and variance reads return 500.
The local coordinator workspace has no Render CLI and no RENDER_* env names.
required_executor_capability: Authenticated Render dashboard, API, or equivalent control surface for existing service apex-platform-mutation-seam.
Ability to inspect service metadata, deployment commit, non-secret environment key presence, and logs without printing secret values.
Ability to trigger redeploy of the existing service from current origin/clean-main.
allowed_runtime_actions: Confirm repository jasonlswenson-sys/apex-power-ops, branch clean-main, working directory apps/mutation-seam, and deployed commit at or after ee214d9559ed5d0ebc2fa4311def407a3711c390.
Confirm build command pip install -r requirements.txt, start command uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port $PORT, health path /health, and autoDeploy posture.
Confirm non-secret env key presence only: SEAM_STORE_BACKEND, SEAM_DATABASE_URL, JWT_SECRET, CORS_ORIGINS, APP_ENV, LOG_LEVEL, and PYTHON_VERSION.
Repair only existing-service metadata needed to match apps/mutation-seam/render.yaml.
Trigger existing-service redeploy from current clean-main if stale or metadata repair is needed.
Inspect logs only far enough to classify remaining PM intake 404s or schedule 500s.
Run deployed mutation-seam smoke with --include-pm-intake and the paired hosted PM intake smoke.
not_allowed: No product code change unless the coordinator opens a new packet.
No assignment, status, issue, task, workpackage, project, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation_steps: Render service inspection for apex-platform-mutation-seam: repo, branch, working directory, deploy commit, build command, start command, health path, autoDeploy, and non-secret env key posture.
Trigger existing-service redeploy from clean-main if the service is stale or metadata repair is needed.

corepack pnpm --dir C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform --filter @apex/operations-web exec node scripts/smoke-pm-intake-hosted.mjs --operations-web-base-url https://operations.apexpowerops.com --mutation-seam-base-url https://mutation-seam.apexpowerops.com --timeout-ms 20000
success_criteria: Hosted OpenAPI includes all four current PM intake read paths.
All four current PM intake reads return governed read-only payloads instead of framework 404.
If schedule reads still return 500, logs classify the blocker without SQL writes, schema migration, or secret disclosure.
If PM intake reads remain blocked, the blocker is classified as stale deploy, Render auth unavailable, DSN, schema, permission, runtime import, or product-code issue.
stop_conditions: Repair would require a new service, DNS change, auth change, ingress widening, secret rotation, SQL write, schema migration, fixture replay, or live mutation.
Logs point to a product-code issue that requires repo changes.
Hosted proof would require a live mutation test.
